parsed_review.summary: CP00-828 is a faithful descriptor-only continuation of the RP27 Platform Extensibility lineage (CP820-827), verified through Read/Grep/Glob only. (1) Implementation — packages/platform/src/registry.js adds PLATFORM_EXTENSIBILITY_CP828_PACK_BINDING (CP00-828, risk A, 10 units, RP27.P03.M05.S22-RP27.P03.M06.S09, upstream CP00-827, next CP00-829/RP27.P03.M06.S10) and CP828 requirements with required_section_rows M05=["Backward compatibility check"] (1) and M06=INTERFACE_ROWS.slice(0,9) (9), matching the manifest/plan included_units exactly. The case set (source_descriptor CP827), descriptor, Hermes packet (phase RP27.P03.M05-RP27.P03.M06, emits_runtime_receipt=false), Claude packet (read_only, promotes_final_approval=false, handoff question to CP00-829/RP27.P03.M06.S10), and closeout handoff (to CP00-829) are all CP828-correct. Every row is built by createRow with descriptor_only=true, runtime_execution=false, and all secret/real-data/no-write flags false. (2) Validators — packages/platform/src/validators.js enforces coverage (plan pack id/risk/unit-count/first-last unit, RP27-only, deliverable {impl 5, contract 3, security 2}, phase, micro-phase, micro-title, section rows) and descriptor (type, source descriptor CP827, authority boundary claude_is_final_approval=false / local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false / human approval required, per-row descriptor-only/no-secret/no-real-data, no runtime opening, no writes, Hermes/Claude packet, handoff); validatePlatformExtensibilityContract pins latest_pack CP00-828, latest projection descriptor, validation marker, mandatory artifacts, and no-leak guards. (3) Tests — packages/platform/test/model.test.js exercises CP828 against the live plan (planPack reads docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json, which contains CP00-828 at packs[0]): coverage errors==[], by_micro_phase M05=1/M06=9, descriptor runtime-closed (api_key_issued/webhook_delivered/workflow_executed=false, source descriptor CP827, handoff to next pack), and contract projection keeps CP00-828 current. (4) Contract — generated contracts/platform-extensibility-contract.json has current_pack/latest_pack CP00-828, latest_projection PlatformExtensibilityCp828InterfaceTailSyntheticFixtureFoundationDescriptor, historical packs CP820-827, case-set sections M05 row_count 1 / M06 row_count 9, closeout handoff to CP00-829/RP27.P03.M06.S10, and validation {valid:true, latest_pack_id CP00-828, no_write_attestation all-false}; scripts/validate-rp27-platform-extensibility-contract.mjs wires upstream-binding + coverage + descriptor + contract checks against the live plan; index.js re-exports CP828 symbols via wildcard. A whole-contract scan finds zero dangerous true flags (no *_issued/_delivered/_executed/_written/_included/runtime_execution/writes_product_state/runtime_contract_opened set true). (5) Boundaries — manifest marks descriptor_only, production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true; enterprise trust not claimed. Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic review/evidence packets (emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. Claude remains a read-only reviewer, not final approver — an expected authority boundary that does not set blocks_goal_closeout. (6) Review hardening — readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1224-byte valid JSON result, no error); validation-report shows prompt 2429<25600 bytes, no embedded full diff/source, only Read/Grep/Glob tools, zero omitted active untracked implementation files; changed-file-scope correctly isolates the unrelated dirty progress-control-room and workbook files (not inferred into pack scope). No P0/P1/P2 issues. The single P3 is informational: downstream closeout artifacts (command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, claude-review-result.json) plus this review's raw-output.json/review-receipt.json are not yet present — the expected pre-closeout state (closed pack CP00-827 carries the full set). Verdict: PASS_WITH_FINDINGS; does not block pack or goal closeout.

findings.title: Post-review closeout artifacts pending (expected pre-closeout state)
findings.details: docs/closeout-packs/cp00-828/ currently contains only manifest.json. The manifest's required_pack_artifacts (line 444) and per-unit evidence_refs point to command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, none of which exist yet; artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-828/ likewise has no raw-output.json or review-receipt.json. This matches expected pre-closeout sequencing: the closed pack CP00-827 carries the complete artifact set, confirming these are generated downstream of this read-only review. The manifest accordingly reads status=in_progress, production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, production_ready_descriptor_verified=false, and pack_level_claude_review.status=pending with empty valid_review_receipts.
findings.recommendation: Non-blocking for this read-only review. At actual closeout, ensure this review's receipt plus command-evidence.json, construction-inspection.json, adjudication.md, and claude-review-result.json are generated, the listed validation commands (closeout-pack/test/validate/rp27 platform-extensibility/git diff --check) are recorded as exit 0, and the manifest descriptor-verified/production_ready flag is set, before committing the pack as closed.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected pre-closeout state, not a defect. Recorded for the closeout authority. Does not block pack or goal closeout.
